attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
DEAL_ID 
,CISCO_BOOKED_DATE 
,SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,OPERATION
,COALESCE(SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT/1),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DEAL_CONS_INCR_AGGR_AR_1
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,23,24

SELECT
NSO.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID
,COALESCE(CAST(NSO.RU_DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CISCO_BOOKED_DATE
--,TRX.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER 
,NSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER       
,COALESCE(NSO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'AR' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,'NEW' AS OPERATION
--,COALESCE(NSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,CASE WHEN TRX.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT >= 0 
                THEN COALESCE(NSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') 
WHEN TRX.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT = -9999
                THEN TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
                ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
END      AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,COALESCE(CAST(NSO.SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT -- DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   --DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT --DD_
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='N' THEN TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT 
                END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT) 
                END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) 
                END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT) 
                END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='Y' THEN TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT 
                END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT) 
                END       ),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) 
                END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
                WHEN TRX.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT/TRX.CONVERSION_RT) 
                END       ),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
--,MAX(TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DTM) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,INCR1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM1 AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(SELECT    AR_TRX_KEY ,DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG TRX
WHERE  TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  > '$$LastExtractDate'   
GROUP BY 1,2
) INCR  ,  /* WI_ERP_INCR */
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG TRX,
(select MAX(EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM1 
from (select EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG TRX group by 1) A) INCR1,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOL,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
--N_AR_TRX A
WHERE 1=1   
--AND INCR.AR_TRX_KEY= TRX.AR_TRX_KEY
AND INCR.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY = TRX.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY
--AND A.AR_TRX_KEY =TRX.AR_TRX_KEY  
--AND TRX.AR_TRX_KEY =NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* AND SS_CD <> 'OPL' */
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TRX.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  /*TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY */
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSO.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
AND NSO.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID <>'UNKNOWN'
AND TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
--AND A.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME     NOT LIKE ALL ( 'RMA%','Replacement%')
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD                       <> 'RETURN'
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW Distribution')
AND NSOL.SS_CD <> 'OPL'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,24
